title: SimplisticTPA
description: The most simple TPA Plugin with commands such as /tpa and /tpahere
body:
# CORE
**A Minecraft 1.21.x  plugin wich adds a tpa system**                                            
# Commands
**/tpa <player>** asks someoene to teleport to them  when you are in combat with someone aka you hit a player you have to wait 10 seeconds before u can tp to someone

**/tpahere <player>** u ask someone to teleport to you you have to wait 10 seeconds before you can tp someone

**/tpdeny** decline a tp offer

**/tpaccept** accepts a tp offer

**/SimplisticTPA <player>** allow/disallow TPA when in combat
(this bassically makes the player to be able to tp even when in combat  and if u write disallow the player cant tpa during combat you need op to write this command)

**/back** 
returnes the player where he died
you dont need op to use this command

**/back disable** disables back

**/back enable**  enables back
you need op to use these commands
